titleStmt.title: SII 36.246: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 246. (A.R. No. 246 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall of the Nāchchiyār shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: The beginning of the inscription is lost. It is known from another inscription of Kulōttuṅga I (No. 249), that the donor of this inscription, namely Vāsudēvaṉ Rājasundaraṉ appears to be the father of Vayiramegan. On this basis this inscription could be assigned to Kulōttuṅga I.

Records a sale of 4,000 kuḻis of land for a consideration of 30 aṉṟāḍunaṟ-kācu by the mahāsabha as iṟaiyili-dēvadāṉa to Vāsudēvaṉ Rājasundaraṉ, a landlord of Iruṅgaṉūr. The inscription stipulates some regulations with regard to irrigation facilities to the granted land. The taxes exempted are antarāyam, veṭṭi-muṭṭaiyāḷ, cillirai and chōṟumāṭṭu. Mentions the land measuring rod, patiṉaṟu-cāṇ-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Iruṅkaṉūr kiḻavaṉ vāsutevaṉ rācacun=taraṉ Iṟaiili tevatānamākaviṭukai
kku Eṅkaḷūrk kīḻeri Etirnila mivaṉukku viṟpataṟku kīḻpāṟkellai Avve
ri nīrkoppukku meṟku teṉpāṟ kellai Ilampiyaṉkoṭṭūr mahāte
var tevatānattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai mpayāṉkoṭṭūr nila
māṉa vitikkaḻanikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai Ivverit toṭṭuvāykkut
teṟkum Inṉāṟ perellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattil meṟkaṭaiyap patinaṟucāṇ
kolāṟ kuḻiṉālāyiramum Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu muppatuṅ
koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci yiṟaiyili tevatānamāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom
Iṉṉilattukkup paṇṭoṭi paḻanaṭai Eṅkaḷūrēri nīrpāyvatākavuṅ kīḻeri nīr nīrīn=tapaṭi
Iṟaittuk koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Innilattukku maturān=taka nallūr nilatto
riṟaikkumiṭattu Ivverikaṇ Ūṭaṟuttu nīr pāyap peṟuvatākavum nīrvilai An=tarā
yam veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ cilliṟai coṟu māṭṭu Uḷḷiṭṭu Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavuñ colla
vuṅ kāṭṭavuṅ koḷḷavum peṟātomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Irukālāvatu mukkālāva
tu muṟcollappaṭṭa Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu muppatu Āvaṇak
kaḷiyilk koṇṭu muṟcollappaṭṭa ṉāṟperellaiyuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nila
meṟkaṭaiyap patiṉaṟucāṇkolāṟ kuḻi ṉālāyiramum Iṟaiyili te
vatānamāka Iṟaiiḻicci Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavan vāsutevan rājasun=taraṉukku vilai Aṟa vi
ṟṟuk kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom . Ippaṭikku kārampicceṭṭuc cīriḷaṅko paṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai verppuṟattu Ārurāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu ni
ṉṟavātippirāṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu Aruḷāḷaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
Ivai kārampicceṭṭu vāmanak kiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅkak ki
ramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampicceṭṭu kuṭṭeṟu paṭṭaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭi
kku Ivai verppuṟattu Āṭkoṇṭavilli paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai verp
puṟattu karuṇākaranampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu Ivvūr civabrāhmaṇan coḻa
paṭṭan sayijaiyātanamaikku Ivai koṭṭūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu . Ippa
ṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr veṭkovan coman Arumpaic celvanen Ivai En
eḻuttu . Ippaṭi mahāsabhaiyār paṇiyāl Ilakṣaṇam Eḻutine
n koṭṭūruṭaiyāṉen Ivai En Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 36.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
